name: Health Revenue Assurance Holdings, Inc.
summary: Health Revenue Assurance Holdings, Inc. provides revenue cycle services for healthcare providers in the United States. It offers revenue cycle data analysis, contract, and outsourced coding services; and billing, coding and compliance audits, coding education, coding consulting, physician coding, and ICD-10 education and transition services. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Plantation, Florida.
